summary: R2 Refactor testing completed successfully. The form now has separate 'Zonas de Terreno' and 'Construcciones' sections as requested. Backend APIs work correctly including Excel export. All 15 backend tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: R2 refactor is complete and working. The form has two separate sections: 'Zonas de Terreno' (with Agregar Zona button) and 'Construcciones' (with Agregar Construcción button, IDs A, B, C...). Subtotals are calculated automatically. The Propietario (R1) tab has separated name fields (primer_apellido, segundo_apellido, primer_nombre, segundo_nombre). Excel export endpoint /api/predios/export-excel works correctly with the new R2 structure (1 zona + 1 construcción per row).

features: Each zone has: Zona Física, Zona Económica, Área Terreno (m²)
Delete button for each zone (except first)
Construction IDs generated as A, B, C... Z, AA, AB...
Each construction has: Piso, Habitaciones, Baños, Locales, Tipificación, Uso, Puntaje, Área Construida
Delete button for each construction (except first)
Separated name fields: Primer Apellido, Segundo Apellido, Primer Nombre, Segundo Nombre
Tipo Documento and Número Documento fields
Shows count of Zonas de Terreno
Shows count of Construcciones with IDs
Shows Total Registros R2 (max of zones and constructions)

excel_export.new_logic: 1 zona + 1 construcción per row, total rows = max(zonas, construcciones)

frontend_tests_summary.navigation_to_predios: PASSED - Gestión de Predios page loads correctly
frontend_tests_summary.fisico_r2_tab: PASSED - Shows Zonas de Terreno and Construcciones sections
frontend_tests_summary.agregar_construccion_button: PASSED - Adds new constructions with correct IDs (A, B, C)
